introduction.content:
the

EDITOR'S COMMUNITY.

The Editor's Community provides all the resources helpful for editors and makes all editors unite.

Explore by categories

Plugins (Mac & Windows)

Find essential plugins for editing on both Mac and Windows platforms.

Software (Mac & Windows)

Discover powerful software tools available for Mac and Windows users.

Useful Websites

Access high-quality websites and resources for your projects.

Help Forum

Ask questions, share tips, and get support from other editors in the community.

general-questions.title: General Questions
general-questions.content:
Where can I find free stock videos?

You can use sites like Pexels, Mixkit, or Videvo.

Where can I find free music and SFX?

Check out YouTube Audio Library, Mixkit Sounds, or Pixabay Music.
